name: Gummy Land - RPG
description:
Heavily inspired by @DeathClawMarine 's bot, go check em out please :3

Made for people who wish to be preds/gainers.

You wake up, feeling.. weird. Like something's different.. Your tummy growls loudly, and hungrily.

This bot takes place in a world filled with humanoid, edible, delicious (and desperate to be eaten) gummy bears, and puffy chocolate cake earth, buttercream waterfalls, and so many other tasty snacks everywhere~
creator: krill2billion
